# PRUVIQ - Transparent Algorithmic Crypto Trading

> PRUVIQ is a crypto trading transparency project that publishes every trade, every loss, and every strategy change with full data. Built by one developer, verified by evidence. The system trades 500+ coins on Binance Futures using a BB Squeeze SHORT strategy with a 70.4% win rate and 2.55 profit factor, validated across 2+ years of data.

PRUVIQ provides educational content on algorithmic crypto trading, backtesting methodology, risk management, and exchange fee optimization. All strategies are tested on 536 coins across 2+ years before live deployment.

## Core Content

- [Home](https://pruviq.com/): Overview of the PRUVIQ trading transparency approach
- [Strategy Library](https://pruviq.com/strategies): Every strategy tested with full backtest results, live or killed
- [Strategy Graveyard](https://pruviq.com/graveyard): Autopsy reports of killed strategies with full P&L data
- [Changelog](https://pruviq.com/changelog): Complete version history with reasoning for every change
- [Exchange Fee Comparison](https://pruviq.com/fees): 9 exchanges compared with referral discounts

## Educational Articles

- [What is Bollinger Band Squeeze?](https://pruviq.com/blog/what-is-bb-squeeze): How volatility compression creates trading opportunities
- [Why Most Backtests Are Lies](https://pruviq.com/blog/why-backtests-lie): Look-ahead bias, overfitting, and the $14K lesson
- [Risk Management: The Only Edge That Lasts](https://pruviq.com/blog/risk-management-101): Position sizing, Kelly Criterion, daily loss limits
- [How to Save 20% on Binance Futures Fees](https://pruviq.com/blog/save-on-binance-futures-fees): Fee breakdown and optimization guide
- [Why PRUVIQ?](https://pruviq.com/blog/why-pruviq): Origin story and philosophy

## Key Statistics

- Strategy: BB Squeeze SHORT (Bollinger Band Squeeze)
- Win Rate: 70.4% (backtested), 54.69% (live, 7 days)
- Profit Factor: 2.55 (backtested)
- Coins Monitored: 535
- Backtest Period: 2+ years, 2,898 trades
- Position Size: $60 x 5x leverage
- Stop Loss: 10% | Take Profit: 8%
- Failed Strategies Killed: 4 (Momentum LONG -$14,115, BB Squeeze LONG -$26, HV Squeeze, ATR Breakout)

## Community

- [Telegram](https://t.me/PRUVIQ): Live trade feed with every entry and exit

## Optional

- [Blog Archive](https://pruviq.com/blog): All educational articles and updates
